_comment: Acquisition data for Ghost Companion. Keyed by item NAME (matches any reissue a player scans). itemHash is the verified current hash (from the Manifest) for reference. sourceActivityHashes lists Standard + Master activity hashes so auto-tracking fires on any difficulty. Drop rates are community estimates and vary by patch. Users can add/override entries in-app (stored by itemHash); see scripts/lookup.mjs to find hashes. GAME RULE (as of the Sept 2025 update + the MoT update): every raid/dungeon EXOTIC is now farmable on a single character with NO weekly lockout — so exotic drops use farmable:true / weeklyLimitPerCharacter:null. One-time quest exotics (dropRate 1.0) and per-week secret chests are the exceptions. Legendary raid/dungeon weapons still follow per-character weekly encounter drops. Verify with scripts/audit-data.mjs.

acquisitionPaths[].pathType: secret_chest | encounter_drop | boss_drop | craftable | vendor | quest | other
acquisitionPaths[].sourceActivityHashes: array of activity hashes that count as a run for this path (auto-track)

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic bow. Drops from the final encounter — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.

acquisitionPaths.location: Spire of the Watcher — between encounters
acquisitionPaths.description: Hidden chests can also award the bow.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Two secret chests exist in the dungeon.

acquisitionPaths.description: Adaptive Scout Rifle from Spire encounters.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Master mode can drop Adept versions.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic invisibility sword. Final-encounter drop — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
Aggressive SMG, a top Duality chase weapon.

acquisitionPaths.method: Exotic Quest — And Out Fly the Wolves
acquisitionPaths.description: Guaranteed from the exotic quest; complete Grasp of Avarice then the quest steps.
acquisitionPaths.notes: One-time quest — no farming needed once obtained.

acquisitionPaths.description: Classic 140 sniper from Grasp of Avarice.
140 Hand Cannon, a premier PvP roll chase.
Exotic scout. Random drop from King's Fall — now farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
acquisitionPaths.notes: May also be redeemable with an exotic redemption token after Pantheon encounters.

acquisitionPaths.description: 120 Hand Cannon, one of the best in the game. Craftable via red borders.
Craftable. Unlock the pattern by extracting Deepsight Resonance from red-border (Deepsight) copies that drop in King’s Fall, then shape it at the Enclave and re-shape later for enhanced perks.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Raid weapon patterns typically need 5 red-border (Deepsight) extractions to unlock. Once unlocked, crafting is guaranteed and fully reshapeable — not RNG.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Stasis/Solar shotgun. Final-encounter drop — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
Exotic pulse rifle. Drops from Rhulk — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
Top-tier legendary rocket launcher from Last Wish.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Wish-wall farming can let you target encounters.

acquisitionPaths.description: Craftable. Unlock the pattern by extracting Deepsight Resonance from red-border (Deepsight) copies that drop in Last Wish (target encounters via the wish-wall), then shape it at the Enclave and re-shape later for enhanced perks.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Raid weapon patterns typically need 5 red-border (Deepsight) extractions to unlock. Once unlocked, crafting is guaranteed and fully reshapeable — not RNG.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic fusion. Drops from the chest after Riven (Queenswalk).
acquisitionPaths.notes: Can be farmed via the Riven cheese / repeated final chest each week per character.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic rocket launcher. Low-chance drop from Taniks — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
acquisitionPaths.notes: One of the rarer raid-exotic drop rates — but now repeatable, so keep running.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic sidearm. Chance from the final chest of Warlord's Ruin (Manifest source: "Warlord's Ruin" Dungeon) — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
Exotic glaive, guaranteed from the Avalon exotic mission quest.
acquisitionPaths.notes: One-time quest.

acquisitionPaths.description: Craftable. Vexcalibur has a weapon pattern — unlock it by extracting Deepsight Resonance from red-border (Deepsight) copies from the Node.Ovrd.Avalon exotic mission (Expert/Legend rotation), then shape it at the Enclave and re-shape later for enhanced perks.
acquisitionPaths.notes: The quest grants your first copy; once the pattern is unlocked, crafting lets you re-roll perks and add an enhanced intrinsic — not RNG. Manifest-verified pattern hash 4223953031.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic fusion rifle. Drops from Atheon, the final encounter — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Master mode does not raise the Mythoclast rate.

acquisitionPaths.description: Iconic 140 Hand Cannon with the Firefly origin trait. Drops across VoG encounters.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Master mode can award Timelost (Adept) rolls.

acquisitionPaths.description: Craftable. Unlock the pattern by extracting Deepsight Resonance from red-border (Deepsight) copies that drop in Vault of Glass, then shape it at the Enclave and re-shape later for enhanced perks.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Raid weapon patterns typically need 5 red-border (Deepsight) extractions to unlock. Once unlocked, crafting is guaranteed and fully reshapeable — not RNG.

acquisitionPaths.description: Solar Scout Rifle, a strong all-rounder. Drops across VoG encounters.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Timelost version available from Master.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Auto Rifle. Get the rare Husk of the Pit from raid encounters, then complete the upgrade quest with Eris Morn. Husk farming has no weekly lockout.
acquisitionPaths.notes: The Husk is the RNG gate; once you have it the upgrade is deterministic.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Linear Fusion Rifle. Drops from the final encounter — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Salvation's Edge exotics became farmable after the MoT update.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Sniper Rifle. Random drop from the final boss of Vesper's Host — farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout.
Exotic Trace Rifle, guaranteed from the Divine Fragmentation quest completed inside Garden of Salvation.
acquisitionPaths.notes: One-time quest; requires solving the in-raid puzzles.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Combat Bow, earned through the Starcrossed exotic mission (Manifest source: "Starcrossed" Mission).
acquisitionPaths.notes: One-time acquisition; completing the mission progresses the catalyst.

acquisitionPaths.description: Craftable. Wish-Keeper has a weapon pattern — unlock it by extracting Deepsight Resonance from red-border (Deepsight) copies earned in the Starcrossed exotic mission (Expert/Legend rotation), then shape it at the Enclave and re-shape later for enhanced perks.
acquisitionPaths.notes: The mission grants your first copy; once the pattern is unlocked, crafting lets you re-roll perks — not RNG. Manifest-verified pattern hash 682995262.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Trace Rifle, guaranteed from the hidden quest started inside Ghosts of the Deep.
acquisitionPaths.notes: One-time quest.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Rocket Launcher from The Desert Perpetual raid. Random drop, farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout (after the MoT update).
acquisitionPaths.notes: Newest raid exotic as of June 2026. Epic mode rewards higher-tier loot.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Combat Bow from the Equilibrium dungeon. Random drop, farmable on a single character with no weekly lockout (after the MoT update).
acquisitionPaths.notes: Newest dungeon exotic as of June 2026.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hunter Leg Armor (Manifest source: "Exotic Armor Focusing"). Bring an Exotic Cipher + an Exotic engram, then talk to Rahool and open his SECOND page → Novel Decryption to pull it directly. Re-decrypt to chase better stat rolls / higher armor tiers.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Not auto-trackable (no activity) — it's a targeted Rahool decryption, not a drop. Cost: 1 Exotic Cipher + 1 Exotic engram. Best ways to farm Exotic engrams: Master Lost Sectors and Portal weekly rewards.

acquisitionPaths.description: Current Vanguard ritual ARMOR set (Edge of Fate). Play Vanguard Ops / Nightfalls to rank up and earn Vanguard Engrams, then focus the set at Commander Zavala in the Tower. Verified live at Zavala 2026-06-28 — this replaces the old Vigil of Heroes ritual set.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Set-level entry. Bungie's API does not expose the individual armor-piece names (the focus list renders client-side), so a scanned individual piece may not match this name. Focus costs Vanguard Engrams + materials (e.g. Enhancement Cores).

acquisitionPaths.description: Current Vanguard ritual WEAPON set (Edge of Fate). Play Vanguard Ops / Nightfalls to rank up and earn Vanguard Engrams, then focus weapons at Commander Zavala in the Tower. Verified live at Zavala 2026-06-28.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Set-level entry. Bungie's API does not expose the individual weapon names (the focus list renders client-side), so a scanned individual weapon may not match this name. Focus costs Vanguard Engrams + materials.

acquisitionPaths.method: Buy at the Monument to Lost Lights
acquisitionPaths.location: The Tower (Monument to Lost Lights — Exotic Archive)
acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hand Cannon. Buy it directly from the Exotic Archive (Monument to Lost Lights) in the Tower — guaranteed once you pay the material cost. Verified live in the Monument catalog 2026-06-29; the Manifest also lists its source as "Exotic Archive at the Tower".
acquisitionPaths.notes: Cost is an Exotic Cipher + Glimmer (some exotics also need an Ascendant Alloy/Shard). Originally Cayde-6's Forsaken-era questline from Banshee-44 (now vaulted). Not auto-trackable — it's a purchase, not an activity drop.

acquisitionPaths.location: Portal → Rewards Pass; once its cycle ends → Tower: Monument to Seasons Past
acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hand Cannon — NOT armor (Manifest source: "Source: Rewards Pass" — the current Portal Rewards Pass system, distinct from legacy numbered Season Passes). Earned by leveling the active Rewards Pass to the rank that grants it.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Manifest-grounded: Turncoat is not in any archived vendor's item list in the Manifest, consistent with it being a current/active Rewards Pass reward. When a Rewards Pass cycle ends, its rewards move to the Seasonal Archive at the Monument to Seasons Past vendor in the Tower (archived Rewards Pass tabs, e.g. "Ash & Iron", "Reclamation", "Lawless"). The Manifest doesn't pin which specific Rewards Pass cycle (reward-item lists are pruned for old passes). Not auto-trackable.

acquisitionPaths.location: Wherever Xûr is this weekend (Fri–Tue reset)
acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Solar Hand Cannon, part of the world Exotic pool (Manifest source: "Exotic engrams; extremely rare world drops"). Most reliable route: Xûr rotates world-pool Exotic weapons into his stock — when Sunshot is offered you can buy it outright. The app's Xûr panel flags it whenever it's live.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Not auto-trackable (vendor purchase, not an activity). Manifest-grounded: Sunshot appears in Xûr's Exotic offerings table. Pay Xûr's usual Strange Coins / Legendary Shards when it's in stock.

acquisitionPaths.location: The Tower (Master Rahool — decrypt Exotic engrams)
acquisitionPaths.description: Random route: Sunshot can decrypt from any Exotic engram (opened at Master Rahool) or drop extremely rarely from world activities, per its Manifest source string. No fixed activity, so it can't be auto-tracked.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Not auto-trackable — random from the world Exotic pool. Farm Exotic engrams via Master Lost Sectors and Portal weekly rewards; once collected, world-pool Exotics can often be focused at Rahool with an Exotic Cipher.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hunter Helmet (Manifest source: "Exotic engrams; extremely rare world drops"). Reliable route: once collected, focus it at Rahool's SECOND page → Novel Decryption with an Exotic Cipher + an Exotic engram. It can also drop at random from Exotic engrams / rare world drops.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Not auto-trackable (no activity) — a targeted Rahool decryption, not a drop. Cost: 1 Exotic Cipher + 1 Exotic engram. Farm Exotic engrams via Master Lost Sectors and Portal weekly rewards.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hunter Gauntlets (Manifest source: "Exotic Armor Focusing"). Once collected, pull it directly at Rahool's SECOND page → Novel Decryption with an Exotic Cipher + an Exotic engram. Re-decrypt to chase better stat rolls / higher armor tiers.

acquisitionPaths.method: Monument to Seasons Past — Season of the Deep
acquisitionPaths.location: The Tower: Monument to Seasons Past (Seasonal Archive) → Season of the Deep
acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Arc Auto Rifle — NOT armor (Manifest source: "Source: Season Pass Reward"). Originally the Season of the Deep (Season 21, 2023) season-pass exotic, confirmed via Manifest season watermark. That season has ended, but it is now reclaimable from the Tower.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Manifest-verified Tower vendor: the Monument to Seasons Past (Seasonal Archive) sells it under the "Season of the Deep" tab (vendor 3394295929). Reacquired with Glimmer/legacy currency. Not auto-trackable.

acquisitionPaths.method: Monument to Lost Lights — Exotic Archive
acquisitionPaths.location: The Tower: Monument to Lost Lights (Exotic Archive) → Lightfall Exotics
acquisitionPaths.description: Alternate Tower route for the same weapon: the Exotic Archive at the Monument to Lost Lights also stocks Centrifuse.
acquisitionPaths.notes: Manifest-verified: listed in the "Lightfall Exotics" Exotic Archive vendor (67760598). Purchased with an Exotic Cipher + Glimmer/Ascendant materials, like other Monument exotics. Not auto-trackable.

acquisitionPaths.description: Exotic Hand Cannon (Manifest source: "Source: An Exotic quest or challenge."). Originally from the Gambit Exotic quest "The Other Side" (defeat the Ascendant Primeval Servitor / Primeval Envoys in Gambit, then complete the quest from the Drifter).
acquisitionPaths.notes: Manifest-verified Tower vendor: The Drifter (vendor 248695599, "Rogue Lightbearer") stocks Malfeasance, so it can be acquired/reacquired directly from him in the Tower without needing the original quest to be active. Not auto-trackable.
